title: UXUI Patterns Schema
description: Schema for patterns.json — reusable cross-page structures decoupled from any specific page. Patterns sit BETWEEN components and ui in the dependency chain: ui -> patterns -> components -> design. Examples include auth-split, app-shell, empty-state, hero-grid, modal-shell. Patterns expose slots that ui.json pages fill with concrete components/sections/content.

schema.description: Schema identifier and version. Pinned to uxui/patterns/v1 for this draft.

scope.description: Declares this file only contains patterns; refs to design/components are allowed but not authoring them.

depends_on.description: Relative paths to upstream files this file references. Typically ['./design.md','./components.json'].

dtcg_version.description: DTCG (Design Tokens Community Group) format version this file aligns with. Used by Style Dictionary transforms.

version.description: Semver of THIS patterns.json file. Bumped independently of design.md / components.json / ui.json.

generated_by.description: Optional. Name + version of the skill that wrote this file.

Ref.description: Cross-file reference. Format: {scope.path.to.thing}. Direction rule: ui -> patterns -> components -> design (downward only). Upward refs (e.g. patterns referencing ui) are an audit error.

SlotAcceptType.description: Allowed content types for a slot. 'component' = ref to components.*, 'section' = ref to a marketing/ui section, 'pattern' = nested pattern ref, 'inline_html' = raw HTML literal, 'text'/'image'/'icon' = primitive content.

name.description: Slot identifier in kebab_case. ui.json pages fill slots by name.

required.description: If true, a ui.json composition using this pattern MUST fill this slot. Audit errors if missing.

accepts.description: Allowed content types for this slot.

summary.description: Short description of what this slot is for. Shown in tooling/style guides.

default.description: Optional default content for this slot when unfilled. Can be a ref string or inline value. anyOf (not oneOf) because brace-refs match both Ref pattern AND plain string — they are valid in either branch.

BreakpointOverride.description: Diff-only overrides for a specific breakpoint. Merged on top of the base pattern (last-write-wins).

VariantDef.description: Diff-only variant override. Agent merges: base + variant (last-write-wins). Only include keys that differ from base.

id.description: Kebab-case pattern identifier. Must match the top-level key in patterns.json.

summary.description: One-line description of what this pattern is and when to use it.

slots.description: Slot contract for ui.json pages to fill. At minimum one slot must be defined.

composes.description: Components built INTO the pattern (not slot-fillable). e.g. an app-shell may compose {components.organism.navbar} as a fixed part of the structure.

html_template.description: Relative path to the HTML template file that renders this pattern. e.g. 'patterns/auth-split.html'. The template uses slot names as placeholders.

breakpoints.description: Responsive overrides keyed by breakpoint name (sm/md/lg/xl). Diff-only from base.

variants.description: Diff-only variant overrides. Keys are variant names (e.g. 'reversed', 'compact'). Agent merges: base + variant (last-write-wins).

tokens.description: Pattern-level token references (e.g. background surface, gutter spacing). Values should be refs to {design.semantic.*}. anyOf (not oneOf) because brace-refs match both Ref pattern AND plain string.

a11y.description: Accessibility contract for this pattern (landmarks, ARIA roles, focus order).

focus_order.description: Expected tab order, referenced by slot name.
